title: Control Access to and Maintain Accountability for CUI Media During Transport
description: control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport outside of controlled areas

checks.name: Access to Media Containing CUI is Controlled
checks.purpose: Control of access to CUI media during transport including tamper-evident packaging, encryption requirements, and courier authorization is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Accountability for Media Containing CUI is Maintained During Transport Outside Controlled Areas
checks.purpose: Maintenance of accountability for CUI media during transport including chain of custody documentation, tracking mechanisms, and receipt verification is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Access to Media Containing CUI is Controlled
checks.purpose: Control of access to CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Accountability for Media Containing CUI is Maintained During Transport Outside Controlled Areas
checks.purpose: Maintenance of accountability for CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Access to Media Containing CUI is Controlled
checks.purpose: Control of access to CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Accountability for Media Containing CUI is Maintained During Transport Outside Controlled Areas
checks.purpose: Maintenance of accountability for CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Access to Media Containing CUI is Controlled
checks.purpose: Control of access to CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Accountability for Media Containing CUI is Maintained During Transport Outside Controlled Areas
checks.purpose: Maintenance of accountability for CUI media during transport is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document media transport procedures requiring tamper-evident packaging, encryption of digital media, chain of custody documentation, and use of authorized couriers or carriers for CUI media transport. Implement a media tracking system and require signed receipts upon delivery to maintain accountability throughout the transport process.
